name: Farmers State Bank
description_short: Farmers State Bank West Salem, OH — Regional Ohio bank with 100+ years of experience offering personal and business checking, savings, loans, and mobile...
description_long:
Farmers State Bank is a regional community bank operating in Ohio with a established history spanning over 100 years. The bank maintains six physical branch locations across West Salem, Ashland, Marshallville, Rittman, and Wooster, serving customers in central and northeastern Ohio. The institution emphasizes its long-standing commitment to dependable service and transparent banking practices rooted in community banking traditions.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking services. Personal offerings include checking and savings accounts, personal loans, home loans, mobile deposits, and 24/7 online and mobile banking platforms. Business customers can access agricultural lending, business checking and savings accounts, commercial loans, commercial real estate financing, and business credit lines. Additional services include bill pay, fund transfers, check imaging, loan payment processing, and merchant services.

Farmers State Bank differentiates itself through its emphasis on personalized banking solutions tailored to individual customer needs, competitive rates, and convenient digital access. The bank highlights its mobile banking capabilities with features like remote deposit capture available 24/7. Customer service is available through multiple channels including phone (1-800-350-2844), in-person at six branches, and online platforms for both personal and business accounts.

As a traditional regional bank, Farmers State Bank serves customers seeking community-based banking with established local presence. The institution appears focused on relationship banking rather than premium wealth management or specialized services. Prospective customers should verify current rates and specific loan terms directly, as the website does not publish detailed product specifications or APR ranges. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mobile banking with remote deposit capture
Commercial loans and commercial real estate financing
pros: Over 100 years of operating history and established credibility in Ohio banking market
Six physical branch locations providing in-person access across central/northeastern Ohio
24/7 mobile and online banking with remote deposit capture capabilities
Serves both personal and business customers including agricultural lending segment
Toll-free customer service line (1-800-350-2844) available for account support
Multiple account management options including paperless statements
Flexible loan options for home purchases and business expansion
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Ohio region with only six branches
Website does not publish competitive rate information or APR ranges for products
About page access blocked (403 error), limiting transparency on company details and leadership
No information provided regarding deposit insurance (FDIC) coverage details
Limited details on specific loan terms, fees, or minimum balance requirements

contact.address: 11 S Main St, West Salem, OH 44287

best_for: Ohio residents seeking community-based banking with local branch access
Small business owners and agricultural customers needing specialized commercial lending
Customers who prefer digital banking convenience with mobile deposit and 24/7 access
Home buyers and property purchasers seeking personalized mortgage solutions
diagnosis: Farmers State Bank is best for Ohio-based consumers and small business owners seeking traditional community banking with local branch access and digital convenience. The main caveat is limited geographic availability (Ohio only) and lack of published rate information, requiring direct contact to compare competitiveness against larger regional or national banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 11 S Main St, West Salem, OH 44287
